title: Nolana clivicola
taxonomy: Nolana clivicola belongs to the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family. It is a species of flowering plant endemic to Chile. The plant is further classified into the genus Nolana, which contains about 30 species of plants. Nolana clivicola is a succulent plant that has adapted to survive in arid environments. Its classification helps scientists understand its evolution and relationships with other plant species within the Solanaceae family.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and improve overall well-being.
